title: Creative Library Asset Intake Manifest v0
description: JSON-compatible schema for a PROPOSED brand asset candidate. Proposal-only: this manifest is produced by the creative-library-intake subagent and reviewed by PK; it is NOT a write to c.client_brand_asset. Hard rule: no license -> no governance (a candidate with missing/ambiguous license is blocked_license and cannot reach 'governed').

x-governance-storage.$comment: Where each field lands IF/when governed into c.client_brand_asset (post-PK). No migration in Lane 1; no new columns.

real_columns.asset_url: derived from source_path -> public bucket URL

x-required-at-governed.$comment: Fields that MUST be present + valid before approval_status may become 'governed'. license is mandatory (no-license-no-governance).

asset_key.description: Human-readable stable identifier; lives in asset_meta.asset_key (NOT a column). e.g. bg_sydney_cbd.

client_slug.description: Brand slug; resolved to client_id (FK) at governance time. e.g. property-pulse.

asset_type.description: Maps to the CHECK-constrained c.client_brand_asset.asset_type column. MUST be one of the allowed values (no new types in v0).

usage.description: Intended use, e.g. 'background', 'logo'. Stored in asset_meta.

source_path.description: Proposed storage object path within the bucket (e.g. Property_Pulse/Backgrounds/Sydney_CBD_Suburbs.jpg). Stored in asset_meta; asset_url is derived from it at governance time. Null until the upload location is decided (PK).

approved.description: PK approval flag (asset_meta). false until PK approves.

is_active.description: Maps to the is_active column at governance time.

source_url.description: Origin/source of the candidate (where it came from); evidence for the licence. Stored in asset_meta.

license.description: Explicit licence identifier/terms (e.g. 'CC0', 'CC-BY-4.0', 'licensed:Shutterstock#123', 'client-owned'). REQUIRED before governance. Null/empty -> blocked_license.

attribution_required.description: Whether the licence requires visible attribution. Stored in asset_meta.

approved_by.description: Person who approved (PK). asset_meta; set only at/after PK approval.

approved_at.description: Approval timestamp (ISO-8601). asset_meta; set only at/after PK approval.

approval_status.description: Intake lifecycle state. asset_meta. Transitions: candidate -> pending_review -> {approved|rejected|blocked_license} -> governed.

safe_for_text_overlay.description: Whether the asset has clear space for headline/scrim overlay. Use 'needs_scrim' | true | false.

has_text.description: Baked-in text present in the image.

creative_score.description: Advisory Creative Score (asset). See creative-score.md. Advisory only; never overrides PK or the no-license rule.
